.4s,box-shadow 0 0) content-box,linear-gradient(#fff 0 0);-webkit-mask-composite:xor;mask-composite:exclude;opacity:0;transition:opacity .4s;pointer-events:none}.pharmacy-doc-card:hover:before{opacity:1}\n.pharmacy-doc-avatar-wrap{position:relative!important;width:116px!important;height:116px!important;margin:0 auto <!-- wp:divi/code {"module":{"advanced":{"htmlAttributes":{"desktop":{"value":{"class":"pharmacy-doctors-css","id":""}}}}},"content":{"innerContent":{"desktop":{"value":"\u003cscript\u003e\ndocument.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',function(){\n  document.querySelectorAll('.pharmacy-doc-track').forEach(function(track){\n    var section=track.closest('.pharmacy-doctors-section');\n    var pag=section ? section.querySelector('.pharmacy-doc-pag') : null;\n    if(!pag) return;\n    var dots=pag.querySelectorAll('span');\n    var cards=track.children;\n    function update(){\n      if(!cards.length) return;\n      var step=cards[0].offsetWidth+24;\n      var idx=Math.round(track.scrollLeft/step);\n      dots.forEach(function(d,i){d.classList.toggle('active',i===idx);});\n    }\n    dots.forEach(function(dot,i){dot.addEventListener('click',function(){var step=cards[0].offsetWidth+24;track.scrollTo({left:i*step,behavior:'smooth'});});});\n    track.addEventListener('scroll',update,{passive:true});\n    update();\n  });\n});\n\u003c/script\u003e"}}},"builderVersion":"5.0.0-public-alpha.23","modulePreset":["default"]} /-->
